faq.title: Get Paid to Install Apps - FAQ

items.question: How much can I earn from app installs?
items.answer: Each app install pays $0.50-$5. Active users earn $100-$500 monthly by installing 20-50 apps per week.

items.question: How long does each app install take?
items.answer: Most app installs take 3-10 minutes. You simply download, open, and test basic features.

items.question: Do I need special skills?
items.answer: No, anyone can do this. Just follow simple instructions like installing an app and taking a screenshot.

items.question: How do I get paid?
items.answer: Payments are made via PayPal, bank transfer, gift cards, or cryptocurrency. Minimum withdrawal is $10.

items.question: Are there apps available every day?
items.answer: Yes, new apps are added daily. Active users typically see 30-50 available app installs per day.

items.question: Can I do this on any phone?
items.answer: Yes, works on both iPhone (iOS) and Android devices. Some offers are device-specific.

items.question: Is this really free to join?
items.answer: Yes, creating an account is completely free. There are no hidden fees or charges.

items.question: Do I have to keep the apps installed?
items.answer: No, you can uninstall apps after completing the required tasks and receiving payment.
